description: Single LLM block configured to call the `get_weather` tool. The LLM is prompted to call the tool before answering; this creates at least one tool-call pause per run. Used by test_tool_calls.py for auto-resume, manual-resume, and max_tool_rounds assertions.

inputs.message: string — a question that triggers a get_weather tool call (e.g. 'What is the weather in Tokyo?')

outputs.result: string — the model's final answer after tool call results are returned

function.name: get_weather
function.description: Get the current weather for a location.
